creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #6)

As I used iwm driver and this driver could not set mac address, I set mac address of all interface to iwm's mac address.

I used EAP-TLS authentication.

I changed to PSK with ports wpa_supplicant but it was the same, i.e. it could not connect at startup. Restarting wpa_supplicant by hand could connect.

P.S. I have another machine and it is working with re0 and ath0 on r336659 at startup. (EAP-TLS authentication)
